disclaimer: Facts-only dashboard. No investment advice, recommendations, or predictions. Scheme metrics are parsed from the Groww corpus refreshed by the daily pipeline. Portfolio weights are illustrative; chart series derived from corpus NAV and historic returns.

funds.name: HDFC Defence Fund
funds.benchmark: Nifty India Defence Total Return Index
funds.exitLoad: 19 May 2023 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 year
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity related securities of Defence & allied sector companies.
funds.categoryDefinition: Thematic funds concentrate on a specific sector or theme rather than broad diversification.

funds.name: HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation / income from a portfolio, comprising predominantly of equity & equity related instruments.
funds.categoryDefinition: ELSS funds offer tax deduction under 80C with a minimum 3-year lock-in period.

funds.name: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund
funds.exitLoad: 01 Jan 2013 Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year Exit load Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation / income from a portfolio, predominantly invested in equity & equity related instruments.
funds.categoryDefinition: Flexi cap funds may invest across large, mid, and small cap stocks without fixed limits.

funds.name: HDFC Gold ETF FoF
funds.exitLoad: 05 Dec 2022 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days
funds.objective: The Scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Gold Exchange Traded Fund.
funds.categoryDefinition: Commodity FoF schemes track domestic metal benchmarks through underlying ETF holdings.

funds.name: HDFC Manufacturing Fund
funds.exitLoad: 26 Apr 2024 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 month
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity related securities of companies engaged in the manufacturing activity.
funds.categoryDefinition: Thematic funds concentrate on a specific sector or theme rather than broad diversification.

funds.name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund
funds.exitLoad: 01 Jan 2013 Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Mid-Cap companies.
funds.categoryDefinition: Mid cap funds invest primarily in 101st–250th ranked companies by market cap on Indian exchanges.

funds.name: HDFC Pharma & Healthcare Fund
funds.exitLoad: 01 Jan 2024 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days
funds.objective: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity related securities of Pharma and healthcare companies.
funds.categoryDefinition: Sectoral funds invest predominantly in one industry such as healthcare or pharma.

funds.name: HDFC Silver ETF FoF
funds.exitLoad: 05 Dec 2022 Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 15 days
funds.objective: The scheme is seek to capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Silver ETF (HSETF).
funds.categoryDefinition: Commodity FoF schemes track domestic metal benchmarks through underlying ETF holdings.

funds.name: HDFC Small Cap Fund
